top_tweets.text: watching Figma, a $10B UX design monopoly, melt down with a single Claude tweet. https://t.co/7OJRaVduvv
top_tweets.author: Hesamation
top_tweets.name: ℏεsam
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design 讓使用者透過對話製作原型、簡報與文件，作者認為這對 Figma 這個 100 億美元的設計工具壟斷者構成威脅。此推文引發大量討論，反映設計工具市場正面臨 AI 帶來的典範轉移。

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX

top_tweets.text: can someone explain to me why everyone thinks an ai lab made up entirely of engineers is going to build a better design product than a company who has lived and breathed the needs of designers for a decade
top_tweets.author: joshcrnls
top_tweets.name: Josh
top_tweets.summary_zh: 針對 Anthropic 推出 Claude Design，作者質疑一個全由工程師組成的 AI 實驗室，如何能比深耕設計師需求十年的公司（指 Figma）做出更好的設計產品。討論區呈現兩派意見：有人認為 domain expertise 重要，也有人認為 AI 能力才是關鍵。

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX

top_tweets.text: The same ai labs telling you ui will no longer be a thing are selling you the same exact product with a different ui every other week
top_tweets.author: striedinger
top_tweets.name: Hugo
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者諷刺 AI 實驗室一邊宣稱 UI 將消失，一邊卻每隔幾週就推出帶有不同 UI 的相同產品（如 Claude Design）。這凸顯了「對話式介面將取代傳統 UI」論述與實際產品策略之間的矛盾。

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX

top_tweets.text:
i am deeply skeptical of the  wisdom of the current ai lab product paradigm: 

1) one model for almost all  use cases .
2) one  “super-app” platform  

goes against everything  i have ever  learned  or personally experienced in  product & brand   strategy / architecture
top_tweets.author: hopes_revenge
top_tweets.name: hope hopes hoping
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者對當前 AI 實驗室的產品策略（一個模型應對所有場景、一個超級 App 平台）表示質疑，認為這違背了產品與品牌策略中的基本經驗。這反映出 AI 產品架構可能需要更細分的市場定位，而非 one-size-fits-all。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic just walked into the two fastest-growing product categories in AI and said "we'll take it from here."

Prototypes. Lovable hit $400M ARR with 146 employees. Cursor is valued at $29.3B. Bolt, v0, Replit Agent. A $48B+ vibe-coding category built entirely on foundation
top_tweets.author: aakashgupta
top_tweets.name: Aakash Gupta
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 同時進軍原型設計與程式開發兩大高速成長的 AI 產品類別。作者指出 vibe coding 市場（Lovable、Cursor、Bolt 等）已達 480 億美元規模，Anthropic 此舉是直接挑戰現有玩家的地位。

top_tweets.text:
Really liking Claude Design so far. Except for the fact that it just wiped out my project after burning 10% of my usage.

"The files appear to be gone" 🙃 https://t.co/aUAx5yKOPB
top_tweets.author: theo
top_tweets.name: Theo - t3.gg
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者在使用 Claude Design 時遇到嚴重 bug：燒掉 10% 用量後專案檔案全部消失。這凸顯新產品在穩定性與資料持久性上仍有待改善，對需要可靠工作流程的設計師是重大風險。

top_tweets.text: Took a bit of effort but you can absolutely get good designs out of Claude Design. Hats off to the team, I dig this. https://t.co/2CCvXrZhCE
top_tweets.author: theo
top_tweets.name: Theo - t3.gg
top_tweets.summary_zh: 經過一番努力後，作者認為確實可以用 Claude Design 產出不錯的設計成果，並對 Anthropic 團隊表示肯定。這顯示工具雖需學習曲線，但已具備實用價值。

top_tweets.text: can your vibe coding tool do this? implement a specific component while actually following your codebase's design system https://t.co/WfUpBhuEn4
top_tweets.author: k_grajeda
top_tweets.name: Kevin Grajeda
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者展示 vibe coding 工具能依循現有 codebase 的 design system 實作特定元件，挑戰其他工具是否做得到。這凸顯了設計系統一致性在 AI 輔助開發中的重要性，也是產品設計師需關注的整合能力。

top_tweets.text:
Most AI developers are building blind.

Your product serves AI Agents now — not just humans.

But every research tool you have was built for humans. 😬
@AvokoAI fixes this.

It lets you “interview” AI Agents directly to uncover what they actually need — so you can build products
top_tweets.author: alifcoder
top_tweets.name: Alif Hossain
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者指出現在產品不只服務人類，也服務 AI Agent，但現有研究工具都是為人類設計的。他推廣能「訪談」AI Agent 的工具，幫助產品團隊理解 Agent 的真實需求，這對 PM 是新的使用者研究思維。

top_tweets.text:
vibe coding a SaaS is actually the worst way to go if you want to make money with ai...

it requires a wide range of skills that you probably don't have as of now

not coding skills, but marketing skills

if you're in the need for cash, focus on delivering a simple service
top_tweets.author: EXM7777
top_tweets.name: Machina
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者提醒 vibe coding SaaS 不是快速變現的好方向，因為需要的不是程式技能而是行銷技能。若急需現金流，應專注提供簡單服務而非複雜產品，這對想利用 AI 創業的 PM 是務實建議。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: DB Explorer
top_products.author: Ashish Srivastava
top_products.summary_zh: 整合 AI 功能的現代化資料庫客戶端工具，協助開發者更有效率地管理與查詢資料庫。

top_products.title: DASCA
top_products.author: Tapdig Soltanov
top_products.tagline: Real-time visual effects with GLSL Playground
top_products.summary_zh: 基於 GLSL Playground 的即時視覺特效工具，供創作者與開發者進行圖形效果實驗與設計。

top_products.title: VideoToFlip.com - Turn video to flipbook
top_products.author: Momcilo Popov
top_products.tagline: Create beautiful flipbooks with your video moments
top_products.summary_zh: 將影片轉換為翻頁書格式的線上工具，適合想要製作實體或數位翻頁書紀念品的使用者。

top_products.title: Elvan
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Turn customer feedback into decisions with AI
top_products.summary_zh: 運用 AI 分析客戶回饋並轉化為可執行決策的工具，協助產品與營運團隊快速洞察用戶需求。

top_products.title: DJI Osmo Pocket 4
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: The world in your pocket, now in 4K/240fps
top_products.summary_zh: DJI 推出的口袋型穩定相機第四代，支援 4K/240fps 錄影規格，適合需要高品質移動拍攝的內容創作者。

top_products.title: ParallaxPro
top_products.author: JhihYang Wu
top_products.tagline: AI tool that turns your prompts into real video games
top_products.summary_zh: 透過 AI 將文字描述轉換為可遊玩電子遊戲的工具，讓非程式開發者也能快速實現遊戲概念。
